PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-06-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ronald Berman (via CourtCall) for npetitioner Neil Poppe.

Mr. Berman stated that on Friday he had efiled a waiver of notice of hearing by Karen Herbst, but added that as reflected in the proof of service attached to the Notice filed June 5, 2017, Ms. Herbst and all other interested persons had actual notice of the hearing. The Court inquired regarding the subsequent Notice filed June 14. Mr. Berman stated that the later notice was filed by someone else in his office in response to a request from the probate examiner while he was out of town, but that he did not see why is was necessary given the filing on June 5. The Court stated that it was unclear whether adequate notice had been given to all interested persons, but that he would take the matter under submission and review it with the probate examiner. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Nuque. (Not reported)
